title: Hieracium flocciparum
taxonomy: Hieracium flocciparum is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification is due to its possession of composite flower heads, similar to those found in many other members of the Asteraceae family. As a member of the genus Hieracium, Hieracium flocciparum is a type of hawkweed. The genus Hieracium is typically characterized by its small to medium-sized flowers and the presence of bitter compounds in its leaves. The plant's classification places it within the order Asterales, a group of flowering plants that also includes asters, sunflowers, and daisies.
